titleStmt.title: SII 28.156: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 156. (A.R. No. 311 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records the royal approval of a gift of land in extent totalling 1 vēli, 1(1/2) mā and mundirigai, partly to site a garden in Kaḍavāchchēri, a piḍāgai of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr in Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu to raise a garden and supply flowers for the tiruppū-maṇṭapam of the God and the rest in different hamlets to support with ilakkai and koṟṟu, two servants tending the gardens, by Maṇalūr Vādulan Ārāvamudu-Mādēvaṉ alias Vikrama-chōḻa brahma-mārāyaṉ of Ūṟṟukkāḍu alias Rājarāja-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Āvūr-kūṟṟam in Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu. The concerned land was purchased from several persons, as anniya-nāma-karaṇam in the name of Vāchchiyaṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Tillai ••••• As in previous number, a maḍakku consisting of some land as entered in the books of the accountant of the ūr, called Uttamappiriyan was ordered to be deducted in the ūr (accounts). The land was to be included in the tirunāmattukkāṇi-pala-varavai. The two servants tending the garden were exempted from doing the tēvai and kuḍimai as was being required to be done by the nimandakkārar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīḥ § tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉāṟu nāḷ Irunūṟṟirupattu nāliṉāl prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa ceyyumpaṭippaṭi Āḷuṭaiyārkkuc cāttiyaruḷa nittaviṉota vaḷanāṭṭu
Āvūrkkūṟṟattu Ūṟṟukkāṭāṉa rājarāja ccaturvvedimaṅkalattu maṇalūr vātulaṉ Ārāvamutu mātevaṉāṉa vikṛmacoḻa brahmamārāyaṉ rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭup perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai kaṭavācceriyil tiruppaḷḷittāmat tirunaṉtavaṉamākac ceyya tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka
palavaravaiyoṭuṅ kūṭṭiṉa nilam Irumāvaraiyum tirunantavaṉamākac ceykiṟa periruvarkku Ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum Ivvūrp piṭākai civapuriyāṉa rājentira coḻa nallūrilum pirāṉpaṭṭāṉ pāṟpatinallūrilum palarpakkalum Aṉniyanāmakaraṇattāl civapuriyāṉa rā
jentiracoḻa nallūrilum pirāṉpaṭṭāṉpāṟpati nallūrilum vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tillai ṉ peril Aṉniyanāmakaraṇattu vācciyaṉ kāṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal cuntaracoḻavatikkuk kiḻakku coḷentiraciṅka vāykkālukkut teṟku 3kū2 catirattum �kū
2catirattum muṅkiṟpaḷḷameṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa rūpāy kha Innilam kālum vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Ivvatikkuk kiḻakku Ivvāykkālukku teṟku �kū 2 catirattu muṅkiṟpaḷḷameṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa rūpāy¬6 Innilam Araiye Araimāvu
m tirucciṟṟampalavatikku kiḻakku kaṇavati vāykkālukku teṟku 6 100 3 10 2 catirattum Uḻaiccāṇaṉ kaṇṇan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉāṉa poṉmentacoḻap pirammamārāyaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa tūtaṉ Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa rūpāy (1/4)mā� Innilam Āṟu māmu
ntirikaiyum Āka nūṟṟirupatteṭṭukkuḻi koṇṭatu Orumā Āka vanta Āka rūpāy 1mā 6� Innilam Oṉṟe Orumāvaraiye muntirikaiyiṉāl vanta maṭakku patiṉāṟāvatu mutal Ūrkaṇakku Uttamappiriyan Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭiyāluḷḷa rūpāy �5 10 9(1/2)mā� maṭakku nila mukkāṇi muntirikai kiḻaraiye
māvaraiye muntirikaiyum Ūriṟ kaḻittu tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa palavaravai Oṭuṅkūṭṭi Innilam Ivarkaḷukku Ilakkaikkuṅ koṟṟukkum Aṭaippāy niṟkavum Ivarkaḷ Iraṇṭum tirunantavanañ ceytu tiruppaḷḷittāmam piṟittu tiruppū maṇṭapattu mutalāka Aḷakka
vum Ivakaḷukku Aṭaitta nilattukku nimantakāṟar ceytu varum tevai kuṭimai ceyyātoḻiyavum Ippaṭi tirumāḷikaiyiṟ kalveṭṭavum peṟaveṇumeṉṟu vikkiramacoḻa pirammārāyaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyakkaṭavatākac co
lli kaṇakkilum Iṭṭukkoḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷāka varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷukkum coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyakkaṭavatākap paṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai rājarājaṉ muventa veḷāṉ Eḻuti kurukularāyaṉum viḻiñattarayarum viḷaṉāṭu
ṭaiyārum nikarili coḻappallavaraiyaṉum Eḻuttiṭṭu vanta ceyyumpaṭippaṭi kalveṭṭiyatu §
Digital edition of SII 28.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
